steps.title: Identify exponential growth
steps.content: Doubling every day means the amount is multiplied by $2$ for each additional day. The starting amount is $84{,}000$, so it is the initial factor.

steps.title: Write the model
steps.content: After $t$ days, the doubling factor is $2^t$. Multiply that by the starting amount. $$y=84{,}000(2)^t$$ The answer is D.
